name: MACD Histogram
description: Computes the MACD histogram (MACD line minus Signal line) and detects zero-line crossovers and momentum shifts. Positive histogram = bullish momentum, negative = bearish. Can be used as a standalone signal or composed with other primitives.
author: system

tunable_params.label: Fast Period
tunable_params.description: Fast EMA period for MACD calculation

tunable_params.label: Slow Period
tunable_params.description: Slow EMA period for MACD calculation

tunable_params.label: Signal Type
tunable_params.description: zero_cross = histogram flips sign, momentum_shift = histogram changes direction, both = either
